title: Northwind Advisory corporate headshots: batch retouch + grade a 3-frame studio session into LinkedIn/website/print deliverables with clean black-and-white alternates
one_line_ask: Batch-retouch and colour-grade three raw studio headshot frames of one Northwind executive into a consistent set of fully-finished colour portraits, then produce clean black-and-white alternates and the LinkedIn / website / print-ready crops, delivered in one review folder.

issues: Very slight warmth in skin tones deviates marginally from the specified cool/blue strobe white balance
Background gradient is marginally uneven — slightly darker at top corners — though within acceptable RAW JPEG export range
Minimal under-grading present; contrast is slightly higher than a pure flat RAW JPEG export but not disqualifying

assets.name: okoro_headshot_frame03.jpg
assets.audit_note: identity-locked regen: conditioned on okoro_headshot_frame01.jpg via gemini-3-pro-image to fix identity/grooming drift (prior copy had heavier grey beard/temples + fuller face vs frame01). Squared pose, arms lightly crossed, warm smile, slight tilt, shadow-side underexposure, RAW-flat look preserved. 3-model identity panel post-fix: same_person=true, pairwise 10/10/10.

assets.name: okoro_headshot_frame02.jpg
assets.audit_note: identity-locked regen: conditioned on okoro_headshot_frame01.jpg via gemini-3-pro-image (Nano Banana Pro) to fix cross-frame identity/grooming drift (prior gpt-image-2 copy diverged: fuller/greyer beard, broader face vs frame01). Soft half-smile, head slightly camera-left, RAW-flat cool look preserved. 3-model cross-frame identity panel post-fix: same_person=true, pairwise 10/10/10.

identity_consistency.checked: 3-model cross-frame forensic identity panel (gemini-2.5-flash, gpt-4.1, claude-sonnet-4-5)
identity_consistency.note: frame02+frame03 regenerated identity-locked on frame01; prior gpt-image-2 copies drifted (beard/hair greyness + face build), which all 3 judges flagged as not-one-session.
